opponents.name: Mira
opponents.title: Frontline Captain
opponents.quote: Hold the center. Let them crash into us.
opponents.reward_hint: Expect sturdy tanks and long fights.

opponents.name: Sol
opponents.title: Sunlit Caster
opponents.threat: Fast spell bursts that punish weak backlines.
opponents.quote: The fight is over the moment the light lands.
opponents.reward_hint: Burst rounds reward stronger item timing.

opponents.name: Brakk
opponents.title: Arena Brute
opponents.threat: Bruisers stack into the middle and overpower short boards.
opponents.reward_hint: Bring enough frontline to absorb the first swing.

opponents.name: Nyx
opponents.title: Shadow Duelist
opponents.quote: If your carry blinks, it is already too late.
opponents.reward_hint: Protect your backline and watch flank spacing.

opponents.name: Vale
opponents.title: Arcane Planner
opponents.quote: There is always a cleaner angle.
opponents.reward_hint: Spread out to reduce spell splash.

opponents.name: Orin
opponents.title: Measured Tactician
opponents.threat: Measured pacing with shields and tempo denial.
opponents.quote: Win slowly, and they will call it inevitable.
opponents.reward_hint: Value mana and sustain in long control rounds.

opponents.name: Sable
opponents.title: Late-Game Greed
opponents.threat: Greedy scaling that spikes later in the run.
opponents.quote: You can feel poor now. I will feel stronger later.
opponents.reward_hint: Punish greed before the board caps out.

opponents.name: Kest
opponents.title: Adaptive Skirmisher
opponents.threat: Flexible tempo boards with fast repositioning.
opponents.quote: Keep moving. Static boards die first.
opponents.reward_hint: Tempo rounds favor quick upgrades and positioning.
